title: Initialization, Indeterminate Values, and Undefined Behavior · Memory Trace: Unspecified Implementation Defined
summary: An optimized release makes an uninitialized-state bug disappear in debug and reappear with a different compiler. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem unspecified implementation defined increment in defined-state initialization audit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish undefined, unspecified, implementation-defined, locale-specific, and defined behavior and collect required documentation.
Explain how undefined behavior removes semantic constraints and invalidates debug-build intuition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Unspecified Implementation Defined · Theory Unspecified Implementation Defined
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 6100. Produce bounded C evidence to read only fields proven initialized by state; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish undefined, unspecified, implementation-defined, locale-specific, and defined behavior and collect required documentation.

steps.title: Build Unspecified Implementation Defined evidence · Theory Unspecified Implementation Defined
steps.instruction:
For this theory demonstration of cmem-unspecified-implementation-defined, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-unspecified-implementation-defined-yl5ynv */" for changed case 2326. It must read only fields proven initialized by state, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.
